acceptance_criteria: Confirmed-order context persists in the queue and exposes accounting and shipping handoffs explicitly.

assertions.label: Confirmed orders appear in the unified queue with stage and fulfillment context
assertions.expected: Confirmed orders render in the same queue as drafts with stageLabel, fulfillmentStatus, and invoiceStateLabel visible.
assertions.observed: OrdersSheetPilotSurface.tsx:193-206 maps confirmed orders through mapOrdersToPilotRows. Lines 572-607 render context cards showing client, stage, invoice, and next step. Unit test confirms 'Issued #55' appears for the confirmed order's invoice state.

assertions.label: Accounting handoff button is enabled for confirmed orders
assertions.expected: The Accounting button is enabled when a confirmed order is focused with single-row selection.
assertions.observed: OrdersSheetPilotSurface.tsx:336 sets canOpenAccounting = selectedOrderRow?.lane === 'confirmed'. Line 488 passes disabled={!selectedOrderRow || !canOpenAccounting || rowScopedActionsBlocked}. Unit test confirms the button is NOT disabled for confirmed SO-002.

assertions.label: Shipping handoff button is enabled for confirmed orders with invoices
assertions.expected: The Shipping button is enabled when a confirmed order has an invoiceId and single-row selection.
assertions.observed: OrdersSheetPilotSurface.tsx:337-339 sets canOpenShipping = confirmed lane && invoiceId truthy. Line 507 passes disabled={!selectedOrderRow || !canOpenShipping || rowScopedActionsBlocked}. Unit test confirms the button is NOT disabled for confirmed SO-002 with invoiceId 55.

assertions.label: Accounting button navigates to the accounting workspace with order context
assertions.observed: OrdersSheetPilotSurface.tsx:495-497 sets location to accounting path with orderId and from=sales params.

assertions.label: Shipping button navigates to the operations workspace with order context
assertions.expected: Clicking Shipping navigates to the operations shipping path with orderId.

SALE-ORD-007.evidence: Confirmed-order queue context, accounting handoff, and shipping handoff are all implemented and unit-tested. The queue renders both drafts and confirmed orders with appropriate context cards and handoff buttons that route to the correct workspaces.
SALE-ORD-007.residual: Live staging proof needed for live-proven promotion.
